lessons.title: Basic Clothes
lessons.topic: Getting dressed for school in the morning
lessons.context: Getting dressed for school in the morning.

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do you put on your feet before you go to school?
questions.hint: You wear these to walk outside!

questions.question_text: When do you get dressed in the morning?
questions.hint: Think about what you do first thing in the day!

questions.question_text: What do you wear on your body to school?
questions.hint: These keep you warm and look nice!

items.definition: A piece of clothing for the top of your body.
A piece of clothing that hangs from the waist.
A piece of clothing for girls.
Long pants for your legs.
You wear this on top with buttons
Girls wear this around their waist
One piece of clothing for girls
You wear these on your legs with two parts

steps.title: Emma Gets Ready
steps.text: Emma wakes up early. She is wearing her blue dress today. Tom is wearing his red shirt and black trousers. Mia is wearing a yellow skirt. They are all ready for school!
steps.scene_description: happy children in school uniforms standing together ready for school morning

steps.explanation: We put the color word BEFORE the clothing word to describe what someone is wearing.
examples: She is wearing a red dress.
She is wearing a yellow skirt.

items.correctSentence: She is wearing a red dress
She is wearing a yellow skirt
He is wearing a green shirt
She is wearing a white dress

items.sentence: She is wearing a ___ dress today.
She are wearing a red dress.
She is wearing two red skirt.
He can wearing a blue dress.
She is wearing a blue dress.
She is wearing a yellow skirt.

items.corrected: He is wearing a green shirt.
She is wearing a white dress.

steps.audio_text: Good morning, class! Look at Emma today. She is wearing a beautiful blue dress. And Tom, you look smart! He is wearing a white shirt and black trousers. Mia is wearing her new red skirt. You all look wonderful for school!

questions.question: Who is wearing a red skirt?
What is Tom wearing on top?

steps.prompt: Look at what you are wearing today. Tell me about your clothes!
steps.expected_text: I am wearing a blue shirt

prompts.prompt: Say: I am wearing a ___ shirt.
prompts.expected_text: I am wearing a blue shirt

prompts.prompt: Say: She is wearing a ___ dress.
prompts.expected_text: She is wearing a red dress

prompts.prompt: Say: He is wearing ___ trousers and a ___ shirt.
prompts.expected_text: He is wearing black trousers and a white shirt

questions.question_text: Which emoji shows 'dress'?
She ___ wearing a blue skirt.
True or False: We say 'red dress', not 'dress red'.
Tom is wearing black trousers. What is Tom wearing?
What do we wear to school?

lessons.title: Accessories
lessons.topic: Packing a bag for a cold trip
lessons.context: Packing a bag for a cold trip.

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: When it's cold outside, what do we wear on our hands?
questions.hint: They keep your fingers warm and cozy!

questions.question_text: What do we wear around our neck when it's cold?
questions.hint: It's long and soft and wraps around to keep you warm!

questions.question_text: Which one do we wear on our head in winter?
questions.hint: It covers your head and ears when it's very cold!

items.definition: Things you wear on your feet.
Clothing for your feet.
A piece of clothing for cool weather.
Something to cover your head.

items.hint: We wear these on our feet
We wear these under our shoes
We wear this to keep warm
We wear this on our head

items.sentence: Put on your ___ before you go outside.
My feet are cold! I need my ___.
Put your ___ on your head to stay warm.

steps.title: Lily's Winter Trip
steps.text: Lily is going on a cold trip. She puts her warm socks in the bag. She packs her red jacket and blue hat. Lily puts on her shoes. Now she is ready to go!
steps.scene_description: young girl packing winter clothes in a bag, preparing for a trip

steps.explanation: When we describe clothes, we say the color first, then the thing we wear.
examples: She is wearing a red hat.
He is wearing a blue jacket.

items.correctSentence: She is wearing a red hat
She is wearing a warm jacket

items.sentence: He is wearing red a jacket.
items.explanation: Color comes before 'a' and the noun

items.sentence: He is wear a warm hat.
She is wearing a green jacket.
items.corrected: She is wearing a green jacket.

items.sentence: She is wearing warm a hat.
items.corrected: She is wearing a warm hat.
items.explanation: Write 'a warm hat' not 'warm a hat'

items.corrected: She is wearing a red jacket.

items.question: He is wearing ___ jacket.
items.explanation: Write 'a' before the color and noun

steps.audio_text: Hello children! Today we're going on a winter trip. It's very cold outside! First, put on your warm socks. Now, wear your jacket to stay warm. Don't forget your hat on your head! Last, put on your shoes. Now you're ready to go!

questions.question: What do you put on first?
What do you put on last?

steps.prompt: Look at the picture and tell me what the person is wearing!
steps.expected_text: She is wearing a red jacket.

prompts.prompt: Say: She is wearing a hat.
Say: He is wearing blue socks.
Tell me: What is she wearing? (Use: red jacket)
prompts.expected_text: She is wearing a red jacket.

questions.question_text: What do we wear on our feet?
She ___ wearing a red jacket.
Which sentence is correct?
questions.correct_answer: He is wearing a blue hat.
options: He is wearing a blue hat.
He is wearing blue a hat.
He are wearing a blue hat.

questions.question_text: True or False: We pack warm clothes for a cold trip.
What keeps your head warm in winter?

lessons.title: Descriptions
lessons.topic: Identifying people at a party by their clothes
lessons.context: Identifying people at a party by their clothes.

steps.instruction: Let's think about clothes at a party! Answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do you wear to a party?
questions.hint: Think about clothes that look special and pretty!

questions.question_text: Look at your friend's shirt. What color is it?
questions.hint: We use our eyes to see colors on clothes!

questions.question_text: At a party, many children wear different clothes. How can you find your friend?
questions.hint: Look at what they are wearing! Is it a red dress? Blue shoes?

items.definition: Something you wear to see better.
A small bag for carrying things.
To make something not dirty.
Not clean.

steps.title: Anna's Birthday Party
steps.text: It's Anna's birthday party! Many children are here. Tom is wearing glasses and a clean shirt. Lucy has a red handbag. Ben's shoes are dirty. He is playing outside. Anna is wearing a pink dress.
steps.scene_description: children at indoor birthday party wearing colorful clothes

steps.explanation: When we describe clothes, we say the COLOR first, then the CLOTHES word.
examples: She is wearing a blue skirt.
He is wearing a red shirt.

items.correctSentence: She is wearing a red dress
She is wearing a green skirt

items.sentence: She are wearing a red dress.
He is wearing two dirty shoe.
She can wearing a green skirt.
She is wearing a blue skirt.
items.corrected: She is wearing a blue skirt.

steps.audio_text: Hello children! Look at this party picture. Can you see the girl with glasses? She is wearing a clean white dress. Now look at the boy. He is wearing dirty brown shoes. Oh, and there's a woman with a red handbag. She is wearing a blue skirt.

questions.question: What color is the girl's dress?
What color is the woman's handbag?

steps.prompt: Look at the picture and describe what people are wearing!
steps.expected_text: She is wearing a blue dress.

prompts.prompt: Look at the girl. What is she wearing? Say: She is wearing...
prompts.expected_text: She is wearing a blue dress.

prompts.prompt: Look at the boy with glasses. Describe him. Say: He is wearing...
Look at the woman with the handbag. What color is it? Say: She has a...

questions.question_text: Which emoji shows 'glasses'?
She ___ wearing a red dress.
Which sentence is correct?
questions.correct_answer: He is wearing a blue shirt.
options: He is wearing a blue shirt.
He is wearing blue a shirt.
He are wearing a blue shirt.

questions.question_text: Tom has dirty shoes. What does 'dirty' mean?
Lucy is wearing clean glasses and a red handbag. What color is Lucy's handbag?

lessons.title: Unit Review
lessons.topic: Dressing an avatar with specific colors and items
lessons.context: Dressing an avatar with specific colors and items.

steps.instruction: Let's think about clothes! Answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What color is your shirt today?
questions.hint: Look down at what you're wearing right now!

questions.question_text: Which clothes do you wear on your feet?
questions.hint: You use them for walking and running!

questions.question_text: What do you wear when it's cold outside?
questions.hint: It keeps you warm and cozy!

items.definition: You wear this on top with buttons
Girls wear this, it goes around the waist
You wear these on your feet
You put these on before your shoes
You wear this when it's cold outside
You wear this on your head
Not dirty, nice and fresh
Not clean, has mud or marks
Girls wear this, one piece of clothing
You wear these on your legs, they have two parts
You wear these to help you see better
You carry things in this
You wear this on top with buttons
You wear this when it's cold outside
Not dirty, nice and fresh
Not clean, has mud or marks

items.question: What do you wear on your feet?
What do girls wear that is one piece?
What do you wear when it's cold?
What do you put on before your shoes?
What can you carry things in?

steps.title: Lily's New Avatar
steps.text: Lily is making an avatar on her tablet. She is wearing a pink dress and red shoes. Her avatar has a blue hat and yellow glasses. Lily's avatar looks very fun! She shows it to her mom.
steps.scene_description: young girl using tablet computer creating digital avatar, smiling child with device

questions.question: What is Lily wearing?
questions.answer: A pink dress and red shoes
options: A pink dress and red shoes
A blue hat and yellow glasses
A yellow dress and pink shoes
questions.correct_answer: A pink dress and red shoes

questions.question: What color is the avatar's hat?
Who does Lily show her avatar to?

steps.explanation: We say the color first, then the clothes word!
examples: She is wearing a red dress.
She is wearing a yellow hat.

items.correctSentence: She is wearing a red dress
She is wearing a yellow hat
She is wearing a pink skirt

items.sentence: She are wearing a red dress.
He is wearing a skirt blue.
items.explanation: Color goes before the clothing word

items.sentence: She is wearing a blue dress.
He is wearing a hat yellow.
items.corrected: He is wearing a yellow hat.
items.explanation: Color goes before the clothing word

items.corrected: She is wearing a pink jacket.

items.question: He is wearing ___ shoes.
items.explanation: Just use the color word before shoes

items.question: She is wearing a ___ skirt.
items.explanation: Color goes before the clothing word

steps.audio_text: Hello children! Today we're making avatars on the computer. Look at my avatar! She is wearing a purple dress and green shoes. She is also wearing glasses and a yellow hat. What is your avatar wearing?

questions.question: What color is the teacher's avatar's dress?
What is the avatar wearing on her feet?
What color is the avatar's hat?

steps.prompt: Look at your clothes and tell me what you are wearing today!
steps.expected_text: I am wearing a blue shirt.

prompts.prompt: Tell me: What color is your shirt?
Tell me: What are you wearing on your feet?
Tell me: What is your friend wearing today?
prompts.expected_text: She is wearing a red dress.

questions.question_text: What do you wear on your head?
She ___ wearing a blue dress.
Which is correct?
questions.correct_answer: He is wearing a red shirt
options: He is wearing a red shirt
He is wearing a shirt red
He are wearing a red shirt

questions.question_text: True or False: 'Clean' means not dirty.
Emma is wearing a pink skirt and yellow shoes. What color are her shoes?
